TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pipaselakan_to_kahirahira_no_dafong_no_Kanata, title = Pipaselakan_to_kahirahira_no_dafong_no_Kanata, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pipaselakan_to_kahirahira_no_dafong_no_Kanata} }

S.FORM: === ta masasitiyor a makakafana' ko no Taywan ato Kanataay a tamdaw === 2022 miheca saka 1 folad, o Yinminhoy , o Yinowenhoy , o Yinyihoy ato kofa no niyaro' ko mipalowaday to ( O pikerid a palafangay a miliso' to tayal no Kanata) , I laloma' no rakat nangra i, micafer a miliso' to (pipaselakan to kahirahira no dafong no Kanata) , o citodongay a parayray a mikitoh nangra ko misaheciay a pakafana' ato mikerid to ha rakat tonini. Itira a masasi'isal to saka fana' to kasafinacadan a pipaselakan to kahirahira no dafong, ta minanam haca to nika pipalowad nangra to matenesay a matayal tonini. Ci Caroline Dromaguet, o tapang no pipaselakan to rayray no Kanata cingra, milayap cingra to naniTaywanay a miliso'ay a sapakaolah a dafong i cingraan. Ta pakafana' cingra to na pipaselakan a rayray nangra, o i 1856 a mihecaan to nano nikafafalican to dafong tono i Anishinaabeg a sera konini saan. Orasaka, patocek sa a pahapinang tonini a pipaselakan a patelian to dafong, o makakafitay to niyaro' no Yincomin koninian. Caay ka tano sa'opo saca to kaciketon to demak to talicayan aca, mapalowad to nangra ko 200 a tamdaw to matanengay, 50 ko finacadan to pakahalakaay to to dafong a miterek a citodongay a matayal a tamdaw no finacadan. O mapahekalay tono pipaselakan a patelian to dafong anini i, sahto o na mafana'ay a mitayal a cirocekay ko misafacoay, citodong haca a mipatalahekal a mitosil to natayalan nangra, mararid a mikapot ko Yincomin tonini a tayal. Pacedi ko pipaselakan a kaitiraan, o mataterekay ato Yicomin ko kitakit no Kanata, 1970 a miheca o hatiniay a pipaselakan a patelian to dafong i, misatapangay to a misafaco to sapipatikoraw to na dafong, ato misaharateng to maanen a masasinga'ay ko kalali'ay ato Yincomin saan. O mamipalowad ko Taywan to pipaselakan a patelian to dafong, minanay to saka dadama to tayal i ikor.
S.PHON: === ta masasitijo~ur a makakafana ° ko~u no~u tajwan ato~u kanataaj a tam…¨~…ģaw === **** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, o~u jinminńßo~uj , o~u jino~uw…ônńßo~uj , o~u jinjińßo~uj ato~u ko~ufa no~u nijaro~u ° ko~u mipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaj to~u ( o~u pik…ôri…¨~…ģ a pa…ĺafaŇčaj a mi…ĺiso~u ° to~u taja…ĺ no~u kanata) , i …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u rakat naŇčra i, mi ¶af…ôr a mi…ĺiso~u ° to~u (pipas…ô…ĺakan to~u kańßirańßira no~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč no~u kanata) , o~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a parajraj a mikito~uńß naŇčra ko~u misańß…ô ¶iaj a pakafana ° ato~u mik…ôri…¨~…ģ to~u ńßa rakat to~unini. itira a masasi °isa…ĺ to~u saka fana ° to~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan a pipas…ô…ĺakan to~u kańßirańßira no~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, ta minanam ńßa ¶a to~u nika pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ naŇčra to~u mat…ôn…ôsaj a mataja…ĺ to~unini. ¶i ¶aro~u…ĺin…ô …¨~…ģro~uma*o~u~u…ôt, o~u tapaŇč no~u pipas…ô…ĺakan to~u rajraj no~u kanata ¶iŇčra, mi…ĺajap ¶iŇčra to~u nanitajwanaj a mi…ĺiso~u °aj a sapakao~u…ĺańß a …¨~…ģafo~uŇč i ¶iŇčraan. ta pakafana ° ¶iŇčra to~u na pipas…ô…ĺakan a rajraj naŇčra, o~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan to~u nano~u nikafafa…ĺi ¶an to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč to~uno~u i anisńßinaab~b~v…ô* a s…ôra ko~unini saan. o~urasaka, pato~u ¶…ôk sa a pańßapinaŇč to~unini a pipas…ô…ĺakan a pat…ô…ĺian to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, o~u makakafitaj to~u nijaro~u ° no~u jin ¶o~umin ko~uninian. ¶aaj ka tano~u sa °o~upo~u sa ¶a to~u ka ¶ik…ôto~un to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak to~u ta…ĺi ¶ajan a ¶a, mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u naŇčra ko~u *** a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u matan…ôŇčaj, ** ko~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan to~u pakańßa…ĺakaaj to~u to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč a mit…ôr…ôk a ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a mataja…ĺ a tam…¨~…ģaw no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. o~u mapańß…ôka…ĺaj to~uno~u pipas…ô…ĺakan a pat…ô…ĺian to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč anini i, sańßto~u o~u na mafana °aj a mitaja…ĺ a ¶iro~u ¶…ôkaj ko~u misafa ¶o~uaj, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ńßa ¶a a mipata…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ a mito~usi…ĺ to~u nataja…ĺan naŇčra, marari…¨~…ģ a mikapo~ut ko~u jin ¶o~umin to~unini a taja…ĺ. pa ¶…ô…¨~…ģi ko~u pipas…ô…ĺakan a kaitiraan, o~u matat…ôr…ôkaj ato~u ji ¶o~umin ko~u kitakit no~u kanata, **** a mińß…ô ¶a o~u ńßatiniaj a pipas…ô…ĺakan a pat…ô…ĺian to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč i, misatapaŇčaj to~u a misafa ¶o~u to~u sapipatiko~uraw to~u na …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, ato~u misańßarat…ôŇč to~u maan…ôn a masasiŇča °aj ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °aj ato~u jin ¶o~umin saan. o~u mamipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u tajwan to~u pipas…ô…ĺakan a pat…ô…ĺian to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, minanaj to~u saka …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģama to~u taja…ĺ i iko~ur.
S.FORM: === ta masasitiyor a makakafana' ko no Taywan ato Kanataay a tamdaw === 2022 miheca saka 1 folad, o Yinminhoy , o Yinowenhoy , o Yinyihoy ato kofa no niyaro' ko mipalowaday to ( O pikerid a palafangay a miliso' to tayal no Kanata) , I laloma' no rakat nangra i, micafer a miliso' to (pipaselakan to kahirahira no dafong no Kanata) , o citodongay a parayray a mikitoh nangra ko misaheciay a pakafana' ato mikerid to ha rakat tonini. Itira a masasi'isal to saka fana' to kasafinacadan a pipaselakan to kahirahira no dafong, ta minanam haca to nika pipalowad nangra to matenesay a matayal tonini. Ci Caroline Dromaguet, o tapang no pipaselakan to rayray no Kanata cingra, milayap cingra to naniTaywanay a miliso'ay a sapakaolah a dafong i cingraan. Ta pakafana' cingra to na pipaselakan a rayray nangra, o i 1856 a mihecaan to nano nikafafalican to dafong tono i Anishinaabeg a sera konini saan. Orasaka, patocek sa a pahapinang tonini a pipaselakan a patelian to dafong, o makakafitay to niyaro' no Yincomin koninian. Caay ka tano sa'opo saca to kaciketon to demak to talicayan aca, mapalowad to nangra ko 200 a tamdaw to matanengay, 50 ko finacadan to pakahalakaay to to dafong a miterek a citodongay a matayal a tamdaw no finacadan. O mapahekalay tono pipaselakan a patelian to dafong anini i, sahto o na mafana'ay a mitayal a cirocekay ko misafacoay, citodong haca a mipatalahekal a mitosil to natayalan nangra, mararid a mikapot ko Yincomin tonini a tayal. Pacedi ko pipaselakan a kaitiraan, o mataterekay ato Yicomin ko kitakit no Kanata, 1970 a miheca o hatiniay a pipaselakan a patelian to dafong i, misatapangay to a misafaco to sapipatikoraw to na dafong, ato misaharateng to maanen a masasinga'ay ko kalali'ay ato Yincomin saan. O mamipalowad ko Taywan to pipaselakan a patelian to dafong, minanay to saka dadama to tayal i ikor.
